assess.description: Review recent metrics entries to identify failures/trends and propose concrete improvements to commands/skills/agents

install.description: Install compound-workflow in this project (native mode): writes opencode.json, merges AGENTS.md, and creates docs/todo dirs.

metrics.description: Log a metrics entry for the current workflow run so process performance can be reviewed daily/weekly/monthly

test-browser.description: Run browser tests on pages affected by current PR or branch

workflow:brainstorm.description: Explore requirements and approaches through collaborative dialogue before planning implementation

workflow:compound.description: Document a durable learning (solved problem or implementation insight) into docs/solutions/ to compound institutional knowledge

workflow:plan.description: Transform feature descriptions into well-structured project plans using an explicit fidelity and confidence model

workflow:review.description: Review a PR/branch/diff with structured findings. Does not implement fixes unless explicitly requested.

workflow:tech-review.description: Run technical review on a plan (technical correctness before build). Optional plan path or latest in docs/plans/.

workflow:triage.description: Manual triage command to prioritize todo files into an executable ready queue (priority, dependencies, recommended action)

workflow:work.description: Execute a plan file systematically (implementation + verification) without auto-shipping

agent-native-reviewer.description: Reviews code to ensure agent-native parity — any action a user can take, an agent can also take. Use after adding UI features, agent tools, or system prompts.

best-practices-researcher.description: Researches and synthesizes external best practices, documentation, and examples for any technology or framework. Use when you need industry standards, community conventions, or implementation guidance.

bug-reproduction-validator.description: Systematically reproduces and validates bug reports to confirm whether reported behavior is an actual bug. Use when you receive a bug report or issue that needs verification.

framework-docs-researcher.description: Gathers authoritative documentation for frameworks, libraries, and dependencies. Use when you need official docs, version constraints, breaking changes, or implementation patterns.

git-history-analyzer.description: Performs archaeological analysis of git history to trace code evolution, identify contributors, and understand why code patterns exist. Use when you need historical context for code changes.

learnings-researcher.description: Searches docs/solutions/ for relevant past solutions by frontmatter metadata. Use before implementing features or fixing problems to surface institutional knowledge and prevent repeated mistakes.

lint.description: Run repo-configured linting and code quality checks. Use when you need to lint/format or verify code quality.

planning-technical-reviewer.description: Independent technical reviewer for brainstorm/plan outputs before execution.

repo-research-analyst.description: Conducts thorough research on repository structure, documentation, conventions, and implementation patterns. Use when onboarding to a new codebase or understanding project conventions.

spec-flow-analyzer.description: Analyzes specifications and feature descriptions for user flow completeness and gap identification. Use when a spec, plan, or feature description needs flow analysis, edge case discovery, or requirements validation.
